title: Friend or Foe Datapack
description: A datapack based on the Friend or Foe SMP.
body:
# Friend or Foe ( FoF )
This is a datapack based on the Friend or Foe SMP by SB737. 

The FoF S2 series: [click me](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLx0t8JXbQ9ZoRPQoPbH7XKB6SLEo2cSkz&si=Z-phde2xJXLU0Mfh)

## What is FoF?
**(My definiation might be different from the original SMP, but this definition is based on my datapack)**
Friend or Foe is a smp where PVP turns off and on every 15 minute. Each player has 10 lifes, when they die to a player they lose one and to get one u have to complete certain tasks. If a player losses all his lives, they he dies. There is also a tracker, they can be crafted to track a certain player. Totem is undroppable, Golden apples are uncraftable and villager trading is ban.
# Features
* Golden apples are uncraftable, villager trading is banned, totem is undroppable set by default in this datapack _(config will be coming soon)._
* PVP toggles on and off every 15 minutes. The timer is shown above the hotbar of all players.
* A player tracker is implemented (just as FoF), the crafting recipe and how it works is given below.
* There are 7 tasks that a player can complete to get lifes, they must be the first one to do the taskes (information given below here).
* If a player losses all his lives, he dies and goes into spectator mode (don't worry he won't be able to teleport to players)
# Tracker (how to use and recipe)
With the tracker u can track down a player of your choice.
If you do TAB in ur server, u will see all players and a number along their name, this number is their ID.
To track a certain player, u have to do the command ` /trigger IDtrack set {playerid} `, before using the tracker, if you want to get the ID of the player you want to track just do TAB and see his id and put it in the {playerid} field.

The tracker is a compass item but the compass won't point in the direction of the player, when u hold the tracker and have selected a player, it will reveal the coordinates and dimension of the selected player every 30 second till you get closer (25 blocks) to him and it reveals for the final time before breaking. 

### Tracker Recipe
![Tracker Recipe, diamond block in all 4 sides, 2 eye of ender in top-right and bottom-left corner and 2 emerald block in top-left and bottom-right side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c134cfb26d8675ebb21ab9bb0741ed64e65657f.jpeg)

# Tasks
Completing each task gives u a life. 
* First task: killing a player.
* Second task: Get 10 netherite blocks.
* Third task: Kill 15 wardens.
* Fourth task: Get Furious cocktail (nether/all_potions) advancement.
* Fifth task: Kill ender dragon.
* Sixth task: Travel to all biomes i.e complete the adventure/adventuring_time advancement.
* Seventh task: Kill all mobs i.e complete the adventure/kill_all_mobs advancement.
  
### MYTHS:
* You have to complete the tasks in order, doing the sixth task but the fifth task is not done then u will not get a life.
* If you have completed a task say Task 3 but task 2 is not completed then u will not get life but as soon as task 2 is completed, you will get a life instantly and it moves to the next task that is task 4.
